hyperedges.label: Wave-2 seams import the merge core

nodes.label: merged_sibling_ids
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Pure D-01 detector: no ORM, no timezone.now(), coupling-tested, mirrors resolver.is_no_show_past_grace

nodes.label: propagate_merged_present
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Atomic ORM helper: flips only SCHEDULED siblings to ACTIVE with shared actual_start and checkin_method=MERGED; faculty-scoped, status-guarded, MSSQL HY010-safe via materialize-before-mutate

nodes.label: propagate_merged_absent
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Online counterpart to propagate_merged_present: flips SCHEDULED siblings to ABSENT with a session.merged_absent AuditLog

nodes.label: CheckinMethod.MERGED
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: New enum choice added via metadata-only migration (no DDL on MSSQL)

nodes.label: make_merge_fixture
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: GARAY test fixture for the merge core

nodes.label: audit_merge_coverage
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Read-only management command classifying every online same-start group in the active term as CAUGHT or MISSED by D-01; became live regression guard after the fix

nodes.label: web/scan.py _apply
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: CHECKED_IN and force-handover ROOM_OCCUPIED branches call propagate_merged_present in the same transaction.atomic() as the anchor save; anchor keeps REAL checkin_method

nodes.label: web/checker.py _apply_action
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Online VERIFIED calls propagate_merged_present; online FLAG_NOT_PRESENT calls propagate_merged_absent; F2F flag stays record-only

nodes.label: scheduling/jobs.py sweep
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: JOB-02 no-show sweep proven byte-unchanged: already skips ACTIVE merged siblings and absents no-event SCHEDULED groups together via shared scheduled_start

nodes.label: 0004_alter_session_checkin_method
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Metadata-only migration adding CheckinMethod.MERGED with no DDL on MSSQL

nodes.label: _materialize_candidates
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Hydrates each candidate row's is_online for the D-01 refinement #2 modality arm

nodes.label: resolver.is_no_show_past_grace
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Existing pure detector that merged_sibling_ids mirrors in purity/coupling design

nodes.label: Plan 04.2-01 (Merge Core)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Wave 1 foundation: the shared merge core every Wave-2 seam imports

nodes.label: Plan 04.2-02 (Faculty Scan Seam)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Wave 2 seam wiring the faculty scan into the merge core

nodes.label: Plan 04.2-03 (Checker Online Seam)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Wave 2 seam wiring the online Checker into the merge core

nodes.label: Plan 04.2-04 (Sweep-Unchanged Proof + Audit)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Wave 2 seam proving the sweep needs no change and shipping audit_merge_coverage

nodes.label: D-01 (merge detection key)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Same faculty + exact scheduled_start + (same room OR same course_code); dynamic detection from existing fields, no merge-group model

nodes.label: D-01 Refinement #2 (online arm)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Two effective-online sessions with same faculty + exact scheduled_start merge on faculty+start alone (room/course dropped for online); F2F unchanged; effective modality = declared_modality else schedule.modality

nodes.label: D-04 (single transaction)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Anchor write and sibling fill occur in one transaction

nodes.label: D-05 (status guard)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Only SCHEDULED siblings flip; ACTIVE/ABSENT/COMPLETED are left untouched

nodes.label: D-07 (per-modality not-present)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: F2F flag record-only; online flag propagates ABSENT immediately

nodes.label: D-08 (shared scheduled_start absent)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: A no-event merged group shares one scheduled_start and crosses grace together in the sweep

nodes.label: D-09 (no CheckerValidation for merge-fill)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Merge-filled siblings get no CheckerValidation; recorded only via AuditLog + checkin_method=MERGED so CHK-04 coverage is not inflated

nodes.label: Criterion #1
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: A single event marks the whole merged group present

nodes.label: Criterion #2
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: The sweep never falsely marks present siblings Absent

nodes.label: Criterion #3
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: The online analog holds; the criterion that FAILED then was FIXED

nodes.label: Criterion #4
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Genuinely-missed non-merged sessions are still marked Absent

nodes.label: Criterion #5
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Sessions stay distinct rows; reporting integrity preserved

nodes.label: execute-phase orchestrator
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Claude discovered plans, grouped them into waves, dispatched one gsd-executor per plan then a gsd-verifier; executors on Opus, verifier on Sonnet

nodes.label: gsd-executor
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Subagent dispatched per plan, ran on Opus, produced SUMMARY.md and atomic commits

nodes.label: gsd-verifier
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Ran on Sonnet; did not trust the executor's non-blocking deferral and ran audit_merge_coverage against the live term

nodes.label: GSD wave model
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Because workflow.use_worktrees was false, all plans executed sequentially on the main git tree rather than parallel worktrees

nodes.label: Wave 1
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Built the foundation: Plan 04.2-01

nodes.label: Wave 2
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Built three seams that depend on Wave 1: Plans 04.2-02, 04.2-03, 04.2-04

nodes.label: The Verification Gap (criterion #3 FAILED)
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: D-01 key missed 48 of 152 online groups (~32%) where simultaneous online sections share neither room nor course_code and teams_link is blank; status gaps_found, score 15/16

nodes.label: The Owner Decision
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: If two online sessions start at the same time with the same instructor, that is a merge session; an instructor is one live presence and cannot attend two online classes at the same instant

nodes.label: '2nd Term SY 2025-2026'
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Live active term audited: 152 online groups; after fix 152/152 CAUGHT, 0 MISSED

nodes.label: MSSQL LocalDB
nodes.author: Claude (Opus 4.8 orchestrator)
nodes.rationale: Test target for manage.py test (not pytest), invoked with a specific Python 3.12 interpreter; drives HY010-safe materialize-before-mutate

hyperedges.label: Wave-2 seams import the merge core
